event.desc: Leader・During the latter part of the Middle Leg, if you're less than 5 meters away from the 1st place, your speed will slightly increase

event.name: Sympathy
event.desc: Your Speed stat is increased by 40 if there are at least 4 other girls with the Sympathy skill in the race
